name: EDUCATIONAL DEVELOPMENT CORP
business: The company owns and exclusively publishes Kane Miller children's books, Learning Wrap-Ups educational manipulatives, and SmartLab Toys. It also exclusively distributes Usborne children's books in the United States via multi-level marketing. The company sells through two divisions: PaperPie (direct sales to individuals, schools, libraries) and Publishing (wholesale to retail outlets).

exposures.sentence: We are the owner and exclusive publisher of Kane Miller children s books; Learning Wrap-Ups, maker of educational manipulatives; and SmartLab Toys, maker of STEAM-based toys and games.
During fiscal year 2026, internet sales continued to be the largest sales channel within our PaperPie division.
